withdrawalFees.title: ZoneCash Withdrawal Fee Tiers
withdrawalFees.subtitle: Configure the fee schedule charged to clients when they withdraw cash at a seller
withdrawalFees.hint: Example: Tier "100 → 999 HTG, Fee: 10 HTG" — a client withdrawing 500 HTG pays 510 HTG total. The seller receives a commission (% set in SELLER ZONE CASH WITHDRAWAL) on the 10 HTG fee. The rest goes to the ZoneCash basket.

toasts.loadFailed: Failed to load withdrawal fee tiers

depositFees.title: ZoneCash Deposit Fee Tiers
depositFees.subtitle: Configure the fee schedule charged to clients when they deposit cash at a seller
depositFees.hint: Example: Tier "100 → 999 HTG, Fee: 10 HTG" — a client depositing 500 HTG pays 10 HTG fee. The seller receives a commission (% set in SELLER ZONE CASH DEPOSIT) on the 10 HTG fee. The rest goes to the ZoneCash basket.

toasts.loadFailed: Failed to load deposit fee tiers

transferFees.hint: Fees apply only when greater than zero. Empty table = transfers always free.

preview.percentage: For a 1,000 HTG deposit, the system will deduct {{fee}} HTG ({{value}}%). The customer will receive {{net}} HTG.

notes.title: Configuration Notes
notes.item1: This remote deposit fee only applies when the seller selects the 'Remote Deposit' option.
notes.item2: When the fee is a percentage, it is calculated on the total transaction amount.
notes.item3: All fees will go directly into the enterprise's 'Basket' (profit) in HTG.
notes.item4: These changes will be effective immediately for all future transactions.
